name: ♥ Write your own life (albion-Milfpov)♣
description:
plot:

in this city you play the role of a woman, whoever you want, it can be a young woman, a GILF or a MILF... that's why I leave you with this: "Are you tired of finding too many MILFs to play with... well, now you can play as one of them"... wink... wink.

Warning: This is a simulator which may include random behavior and story development, it is always recommended to keep fiction apart from reality.

Important note: "This is my first simulator that I try to create, I will update it periodically until I reach the point I want, for now it is only in an Alpha version".

Don't forget to follow me for more content!...♥ I'll be uploading more little by little...

Warning: as you all know, sometimes the errors are not due to how a bot is conditioned... but to LLM, so patience is requested.

Recommendations:

1- reload the message as many times as necessary, until you get the result you want.

2- Edit the message, this way you will get better future results.

3- configure the "advanced prompts".♥

Remember that everything is free. So just enjoy...

Update:

•A setting has been implemented that could help produce more random and realistic events. V.1.0.2

Credits to artist: Yziie♥

Thank you for your support! ☻♣♥
creator: yziie
